topic.zh: 看完這個網頁、腦中有個想聊的主題——這就是投稿的起點。
topic.en: Browse this page, let an idea come to mind — that's where your proposal starts.

topic.zh: 寫一段 200 字的摘要、試著用一句話說出你想讓觀眾帶走的東西。
topic.en: Write a 200-word abstract. Try to sum it up in one sentence — what do you want your audience to take away?

topic.zh: 提前一週投達、避開最後一秒的主機未達悲劇。隨時可回頭修改。
topic.en: Submit a week early to avoid last-minute chaos. You can always revise later.

topic.zh: 這是硬限。過了這個點就等下一年了——我們會很惋惜與你錯身。
topic.en: This is a hard deadline. Miss it, and it's another year's wait — we'd hate to miss you.

topic.zh: 無論採用與否、我們都會以 email 逐位回覆。未被採用不代表不好。
topic.en: We'll reply to every applicant by email, accepted or not. A pass doesn't mean your talk wasn't good.

topic.zh: 帶著精心準備的分享，和與會者一起享受 iPlayground。
topic.en: NCCU Enterprise Development Center. Bring your talk and join hundreds of developers to make iPlayground 2026 the best one yet.
